summary: Phase 1 NIRO Redesign Testing Complete - All foundation features verified. Login screen fully tested via Playwright, HomeScreen verified via code review (requires Google OAuth).

login_screen_gradient_background.verification: Background: linear-gradient(rgb(74, 155, 142) 0%, rgb(251, 248, 243) 100%) - teal (#4A9B8E) to cream (#FBF8F3)

homescreen_no_phone_frame.verification: No phone-frame constraints found in SimplifiedApp.jsx or App.js. Container uses max-w-7xl mx-auto for full-width responsive layout.

homescreen_design_tokens.verification: HomeScreen.jsx uses colors.teal.primary, colors.teal.soft, colors.teal.dark, colors.peach.primary from theme.js

cta_button_peach_styling.verification: HomeScreen lines 373-377: 'Get Your Free 10-Min Call' button uses backgroundColor: colors.peach.primary, boxShadow: shadows.peach, className rounded-full

life_topics_shadow_styles.verification: CategoryModule and MinimalistTile components use boxShadow: shadows.card (0 4px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04))

bottom_nav_mobile_only.verification: BottomNav.jsx line 36: className includes 'md:hidden' - nav hidden on screens >= 768px

responsive_grid_tiles.verification: HomeScreen.jsx line 258: className='grid grid-cols-3 md:grid-cols-6 gap-2' - 3 cols mobile, 6 cols desktop

lexend_font_import.verification: index.html includes Google Fonts link for Lexend with weights 300-800. index.css applies 'Lexend' as primary font-family.

test_credentials.note: Google OAuth required for HomeScreen access - login screen features tested via Playwright, HomeScreen features verified via code review

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 redesign complete. Login screen uses new teal-cream gradient, Lexend font, pill-shaped login button, and peach trust indicators. HomeScreen uses new design tokens, teal hero gradient, peach CTA button, card shadows, mobile-only bottom nav (md:hidden), and responsive 3/6 column grid. Phone frame removed from SimplifiedApp.jsx. All CSS variables defined in index.css.
